/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -Wall -msse4.2 -mavx2 -mfma -shared -Wl,-soname,libyolo11_sdk.so -o libyolo11_sdk.so CMakeFiles/yolo11_sdk.dir/src/yolo11_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yolo11_sdk.dir/src/yolo11_sdk.cpp.o   -L/usr/local/TensorRT-10.0.1.5/lib  -L/usr/local/cuda/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/TensorRT-10.0.1.5/lib:/usr/local/cuda/lib64:/home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lnvinfer -lnvinfer_plugin -lcuda /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_calib.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_photo.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_ptcloud.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_stereo.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_stitching.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_video.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_features.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_geometry.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_flann.so.5.0.0 /home/jovyan/algorithm_sdk_tensorrt/third_party/opencv/lib/libopencv_core.so.5.0.0
